promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest refined-fuel semantic fences and nonconflation packets from the parent batch.
They keep source lineage explicit while avoiding fresh raw-source reconciliation work.
They preserve the live Axis-4 / Axis-5 mismatch instead of collapsing it into one story.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain authority, glossary-finalization, or hierarchy overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong formal fuel, but not sufficient to settle active truth by source header alone.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
